name: webcmd
description: Deterministic CLI surfaces for websites, browser sessions, desktop apps, and local tools.

interface.shortDescription: Use websites and browser sessions as CLI commands.
interface.longDescription: Install one Webcmd discovery skill for Codex. The Webcmd CLI serves current workflow skills for adapters, browser control, adapter repair, sitemaps, and search.
defaultPrompt: Use Webcmd to find the right command for this task.
Use Webcmd browser control for this site flow.
Create a Webcmd adapter for this workflow.
